packets.source_name: European Data Protection Board (EDPB) — publications RSS
packets.title: EDPB new publication notice (fixture v2 — new item)

operator_checklist.label: Confirm fixture-only simulated change (not live fetch)
Confirm official_url matches allowlisted registry entry
Do not record legal change conclusion or client/evidence approval
Assign offline triage label (placeholder only — not persisted)

manual_review_steps: Open packet summary and confirm candidate_id links to review export.
Compare previous_metadata_hash and current_metadata_hash (fixture simulation only).
Inspect title and official_url metadata — do not treat as verified legal text.
Record operator triage intent using decision placeholders (offline; not persisted).
If Supabase becomes available, defer persistence to T075B runtime queue.
If network check approved later, defer verify-on-source to T076+ controlled check.

mark_for_manual_inspection.label: Mark for manual inspection (offline triage)
mark_for_manual_inspection.note_placeholder: Operator intent only — not persisted; does not approve evidence or publication.

request_source_verification_later.label: Request source verification later (when network approved)
request_source_verification_later.note_placeholder: Defer verify-on-source until Control Tower approves controlled network check.

keep_blocked.label: Keep blocked (gates remain closed)
keep_blocked.note_placeholder: Retain blocked state; no client/evidence/publication use until explicit later gates.

discard_fixture_candidate.label: Discard fixture candidate (simulation only)
discard_fixture_candidate.note_placeholder: Mark fixture diff as non-actionable for pilot — does not delete registry fixtures.

packets.public_note: T075D offline decision packet. Metadata-only fixture context for operator triage. Not verified on source; not legal change; not evidence; not publication-approved.

public_note: T075D offline source pilot decision packet export. Metadata-only fixture context for manual operator triage; no network; no Supabase persistence; no full legal text. Evidence and publication gates remain closed.
